nasb.text: Therefore, having been justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ,

esv.text: Therefore, since we have been justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ.

cnv.text: 所以，我們既然因信稱義，就藉著我們的主耶穌基督與　神和好；

ccb.text: 我们既然因信而被称为义人，就借着我们的主耶稣基督与上帝和好了。

csbs.text: 这样，我们既然因信称义，就藉着我们的主耶稣基督与神和好了；
